DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-08-2018 Continued To Feb-20-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling, modified, as follows:

DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to February 20, 2018 pending the determination of the complex designation application. This case was consolidated under the lead case Lefiti v. Allied Universal 559883 per court order filed on 2/07/18 under the lead case.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.
